events.description: Alice harvests from flourishing fields (+8 food, capped at 100) — granary remains full and abundant
Bob fires up the forge with sustainable wood supply — crafts 3 quality tools (+12 gold) — village gold approaching 300!
Carol completes remedy documentation and presents to traders — 'Remedy of the Northern Spring' officially listed (+8 gold)
Village Gold Approaches 300! Village prosperity unprecedented — Food 100, Gold 284, Medicine pillar born! Four pillars now guide village destiny.
